findings.evidence: Current API grep: `Deck.lean:112:lemma eq_proj_of_mem_orbit`; Mathlib grep: `GroupAction/Defs.lean:292:theorem orbitRel_apply {a b : α} : orbitRel G α a b ↔ a ∈ orbit G b` and `GroupAction/Defs.lean:347:abbrev orbitRel.Quotient`.
findings.fix: Add the quotient-facing lemma, e.g. `lemma eq_proj_of_orbitRel {e₁ e₂} (h : MulAction.orbitRel (Deck p) E e₁ e₂) : p e₁ = p e₂`, and preferably the descended projection with a `@[simp]` mk lemma if this PR is meant to provide the quotient projection API.
findings.issue: `eq_proj_of_mem_orbit` exposes the invariant only in `e₁ ∈ MulAction.orbit (Deck p) e₂` form, so a consumer constructing `Quotient.lift p` over `MulAction.orbitRel (Deck p) E` still has to unfold/rewrite the quotient relation.

findings.evidence: `Deck.lean:93` already marks `smul_eq_apply` as `@[simp]`, while `Deck.lean:97:lemma proj_smul (φ : Deck p) (e : E) : p (φ • e) = p e` has no automation annotation.
findings.fix: Mark `proj_smul` as `@[simp]`; it rewrites a projection of an action to the underlying point and cannot loop.
findings.issue: `proj_smul` is the normal-form projection lemma for the public `Deck p` action but is not tagged `@[simp]`, so `simp` will not reduce `p (φ • e)` to `p e` without naming the lemma.

summary: The added deck-action facts are useful, but the public API is still missing the quotient-shaped characteristic lemma needed by the stated downstream quotient projection, and the basic projection-simp normal form is unannotated.
